egress_attempts: cd /tmp && timeout 20 curl -s "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AdguardTeam/dnsproxy/master/upstream/plain.go" -o up_plain.go 2>&1; wc -l up_plain.go 2>/dev/null && echo OK || echo "NO NET"

git remote -v; echo "---tags---"; git tag | head; echo "---branches---"; git branch -a; echo "---show any upstream ref---"; ls -la; echo "---"; find . -name '*.orig' -o -name '*upstream_ref*' 2>/dev/n
